fields.domain: Apex domain only. No protocol, no paths, no subdomains unless absolutely required.
fields.name: Human-readable brand name shown in UI/logging.
fields.aliases: Optional alternate apex domains the same brand owns (regional or legacy). Matched and blocked alongside the primary domain.
fields.type: Broad FitShield behavior bucket. Examples: fast_food, delivery.
fields.countries: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country codes (two uppercase letters) where this brand is active or relevant, such as US, CA, CN.
fields.regions: Broad region tags for future filtering. One or more of: NA, EU, AS, SA, AF, OC, AN.
fields.category: Primary food/business category, such as burger, pizza, chicken, coffee, sandwich, delivery.
fields.specialties: More specific foods/services the brand is known for.
fields.enabled: Whether this entry should be active by default.
